about.heading: Hey there. I'm Michał — a frontend developer and UI designer based in Warsaw, creating modern web experiences that blend clean design with thoughtful engineering.
about.description: I enjoy turning ideas into fast, elegant, and user-friendly products for startups, agencies, and ambitious brands.

featuredWork.title: Modern Portfolio for a Creative Agency
featuredWork.description: Crafted a polished, high-performance website experience that highlighted services, case studies, and a strong visual identity.

featuredWork.title: Dashboard Redesign for a SaaS Product
featuredWork.description: Delivered a cleaner information architecture and design system update that improved clarity, usability, and onboarding flow.

bulletPoints: Built polished, production-ready web apps with Next.js, React, and Tailwind CSS
Collaborated closely with product and design teams to ship fast, accessible interfaces
Improved front-end performance and component consistency across several projects
Designed and developed landing pages, dashboards, and brand experiences for digital products
Turned client ideas into modern interfaces with a strong focus on usability
Created reusable UI patterns that sped up delivery across multiple launches
